Defendant China Basin Ballpark Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY LLC's Motion To Seal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted. There is good cause to seal the cited documents per CRC 2.550 et seq.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MICHAEL VON LOEWENFELDT, Esq. of Wagstaffe, von Lowenfeldt, Busch & Radwick (Tel: 415-357-8909) for plaintiff;
Atty. R. ADAM LAURIDEN, Esq. of Keker, Van Nest & Peters LLP (Tel: 415-391-5400) for defendant China Basin Ballpark Company LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY LLC's Motion To Seal.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY, LLC's unopposed motion to seal is granted. Per
California Rule of Court 2.550(d), there is good cause to seal Exhibit E to the Declaration of Elizabeth Pantages [private financial information] and Exhibit A to the Groeschner Declaration [private medical information]. The Court finds that: (1) There exists an overriding interest that overcomes the right of public access to the record; (2) The overriding interest supports sealing the record; (3) A substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the record is not sealed; (4) The proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and (5) No less restrictive means exist to achieve the overriding interest.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
